description: Quote-card graphic on a light blue background with a faint, low-opacity Department of Homeland Security seal watermark behind the text. A multi-line quotation is set in dark blue or navy sans-serif text, with the attribution in italic at the lower right. The quotation reads: '“These policy measures are consistent with the Biden-Harris administration's priorities to eliminate unnecessary barriers to our nation’s legal immigration system and reduce burdens on noncitizens who may be eligible for immigration benefits. USCIS is committed to promoting policies and procedures that ensure we operate in a fair, efficient, and humane manner that reflects America’s heritage as a land of opportunity for those who seek it.”' attributed to '— Acting USCIS Director Tracy Renaud'.
notable_text: 'These policy measures are consistent with the Biden-Harris administration's priorities to eliminate unnecessary barriers to our nation’s legal immigration system... a land of opportunity for those who seek it.' — Acting USCIS Director Tracy Renaud
